user.title: Add Aromadd Diffuser
user.description: Select your Aromadd diffuser from the list of nearby Bluetooth devices. Make sure it is powered on and not currently connected in the Aromadd phone app.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Add Aromadd Diffuser
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

abort.no_devices_found: No nearby Bluetooth devices were found. Power on the diffuser, keep it close to a Bluetooth adapter, and close the Aromadd app so the device is not already connected.
